text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Shuka Sho, the last race of the
Triple Tiara series, has arrived.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove thanks me for all my efforts so far,
and then heads to the track to take on challenge
ahead of her.
